reviews.comment:
Mucha cola y los surtidores muy lentos, no sé si es problema de los playeros o de las máquinas, pero estuvimos 15 minutos para cargar 30 litros, ni bombenado a mano tardas tanto

(Translated by Google)
Long queue and very slow pumps. I don't know if it's a problem with the pump attendants or the machines, but we spent 15 minutes to fill up 30 liters. Not even pumping by hand takes that long.
